owner_facing_goal: 为玩家提供一个稳定的 MyVillage 命名空间入口，右键即可通过 GuideME 打开 myvillage:cultivation 修炼指南。

behavior.server_client_boundary: Right-click use calls GuidesCommon to open myvillage:cultivation only on the logical client. The server performs no guide-opening action, and MyVillage adds no payload or client-authored coordinates, velocity, entity identity, guide state, player state, or item state.
behavior.interaction: CultivationHandbookItem overrides right-click use to ask GuidesCommon to open myvillage:cultivation while preserving the one-stack handbook, and overrides the item tooltip with bilingual translatable text.
behavior.cooldown_or_durability: No cooldown or durability; max stack size is one.
tests: ModItems registers CultivationHandbookItem with stacksTo(1) and exposes it in myvillage:main immediately after both cultivation steles
right-click calls GuidesCommon for exactly myvillage:cultivation only on the logical client
right-click preserves the handbook stack and relies on GuideME remembered-page behavior
no MyVillage guide-opening payload, coordinates, velocity, identity, or mutable state cross the client/server boundary
the tooltip override resolves bilingual translatable text
common and dedicated-server class loading remain side-safe

commands: right-click the handbook, navigate away from the index, close it, and right-click again to verify GuideME remembered-page behavior
jar_checks: English and Chinese item name and tooltip translation keys
the myvillage:cultivation guide definition and its declared bilingual pages
no assets/myvillage/textures/item/cultivation_handbook.png, embedded GuideME jar, or copied GuideME classes

non_goals: cooldown, durability, rarity override, or custom data components
a MyVillage-specific handbook texture or copied GuideME visual asset
a MyVillage payload or any client-authored coordinates, velocity, identity, guide state, player state, or item state
changes to cultivation authority, progression, persistence, or synchronization
a custom guide navigation or remembered-page implementation outside GuideME
